message:
fix(freeze): insert2/3/4 dupRef + nip freeRef + IC null guard; hybrid -Oz shards

Bug fixes:
- insert2/3/4: use CV.dupRef for duplicated stack value (was raw bit copy
  causing use-after-free when op_put_field consumed one copy's refcount)
- nip: add CV.freeRef for removed stack value (was leaking ref-counted values)
- IC null guard: prevent js_frozen_ic_load from matching freed objects where
  both ic_shape and p->shape are NULL

Performance:
- Add 15 noinline runtime helpers (op_call, op_call_method, returnFromStack,
  returnUndef, op_call_constructor, op_apply, for_of/in, define_method/class,
  append, etc.) reducing thin codegen from ~20KB to ~2-3KB per function
- Single-block optimization: skip switch/while dispatch for 1-block functions
- Hybrid shard optimization: ReleaseFast (-O2) for 155 full-codegen shards,
  ReleaseSmall (-Oz) for 340 thin-codegen shards via frozen_thin_shard_start
  metadata file; all-ReleaseSmall remains optimal (171MB/6.35s vs 187MB/7.34s)

Binary: 249.6MB → 171MB (all-ReleaseSmall), TSC --noEmit: 7.34s → 6.35s
